title: Message/set silently ignores unknown patch keys unlike contact_set
description: In jmap.rs message_set() update path, unknown JSON Pointer patch keys are silently discarded with a comment 'Unknown patch path: ignore (permissive)'. contact_set() under the same codebase rejects unknown patch paths with invalidArguments. The inconsistency means a client typo in a Message/set patch key (e.g. /deliveryStatus instead of /delivery_status) silently succeeds with no update, making bugs hard to diagnose. Align message_set to reject unknown patch paths the same way contact_set does.
